{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Accountant",
  "description": "J.A.K Group&nbsp;is a Global Player who is Focused &amp; Growth Driven, committed to meeting Emerging Energy Needs through Ethical Practices, applies Forward Thinking Innovative Solutions in Creating Value, Whilst being at the Forefront of the Energy Transition.&nbsp;J.A.K Group&nbsp;is committed to turning Energy into Opportunity and Building an Energy Business for the Future. We are Dynamic, Responsive, Ethically Responsible, Proactive and Growing. We Believe in Creating Values and Making a Difference

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Jabi, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly experienced and detail-oriented Senior Accountant with strong expertise in Trade Finance to join our finance team.


Job Responsibilities


	Manage and oversee all financial accounting operations of the organization
	Handle trade finance transactions including Letters of Credit (LC), Bills for Collection, and Bank Guarantees
	Liaise with banks and financial institutions on import/export financing and documentation
	Ensure proper documentation and compliance with international trade regulations and policies
	Prepare and review financial statements, reports, and reconciliations
	Monitor cash flow, working capital, and foreign exchange transactions
	Ensure accurate recording of trade-related transactions in the accounting system
	Conduct financial analysis and provide insights for business decision-making
	Ensure compliance with tax laws, accounting standards, and internal controls
	Support audits (internal and external) and ensure timely resolution of audit queries
	Supervise and guide junior accounting staff
	Identify areas for cost reduction and process improvement


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc/ Masters . in Accounting, Finance,
	Minimum of 5+ years of experience in accounting, with strong focus on trade finance
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, or equivalent) is an added advantage
	In-depth knowledge of Letters of Credit (LC), import/export documentation, and banking processes
	Strong understanding of financial reporting, tax regulations, and compliance
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Excellent analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills
	Strong attention to detail and ability to work under pressure.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to:&nbsp;cv@jakgroup.ng&nbsp;copy:&nbsp;hr@jakgroup.ng&nbsp;using &quot;Senior Accountant (Trade Finance) Application&quot; as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-06",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-05",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "J.A.K Group"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197019"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

}



Senior Accountant Job at J.A.K Group




        
    

        
        J.A.K Group is a Global Player who is Focused & Growth Driven, committed to meeting Emerging Energy Needs through Ethical Practices, applies Forward Thinking Innovative Solutions in Creating Value, Whilst being at the Forefront of the Energy Transition. J.A.K Group is committed to turning Energy into Opportunity and Building an Energy Business for the Future. We are Dynamic, Responsive, Ethically Responsible, Proactive and Growing. We Believe in Creating Values and Making a Difference

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Accountant

Job Location: Jabi, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly experienced and detail-oriented Senior Accountant with strong expertise in Trade Finance to join our finance team.


Job Responsibilities


	Manage and oversee all financial accounting operations of the organization
	Handle trade finance transactions including Letters of Credit (LC), Bills for Collection, and Bank Guarantees
	Liaise with banks and financial institutions on import/export financing and documentation
	Ensure proper documentation and compliance with international trade regulations and policies
	Prepare and review financial statements, reports, and reconciliations
	Monitor cash flow, working capital, and foreign exchange transactions
	Ensure accurate recording of trade-related transactions in the accounting system
	Conduct financial analysis and provide insights for business decision-making
	Ensure compliance with tax laws, accounting standards, and internal controls
	Support audits (internal and external) and ensure timely resolution of audit queries
	Supervise and guide junior accounting staff
	Identify areas for cost reduction and process improvement


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc/ Masters . in Accounting, Finance,
	Minimum of 5+ years of experience in accounting, with strong focus on trade finance
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, or equivalent) is an added advantage
	In-depth knowledge of Letters of Credit (LC), import/export documentation, and banking processes
	Strong understanding of financial reporting, tax regulations, and compliance
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Excellent analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills
	Strong attention to detail and ability to work under pressure.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] copy: [email protected] using "Senior Accountant (Trade Finance) Application" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Female Personal Assistant to the CEO",
  "description": "Welcome to Thowbiemakeovers, Our company Majors in Aesthetic Medicine and Medical Spa services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Personal Assistant to the CEO

Job Location:&nbsp;Ojodu Berger &amp; Environs, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Working Days: Monday &ndash; Saturday

Job Description


	Are you highly organized, proactive, and ready to work closely with top-level management? We are looking for a smart, reliable, and professional Personal Assistant to support the CEO in daily operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage schedules, appointments, and meetings efficiently
	Handle correspondence and communication on behalf of the CEO
	Prepare reports, documents, and presentations
	Coordinate activities and ensure smooth daily operations
	Maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc or equivalent qualification
	At least 2 years of experience as a Personal Assistant or similar role and must not be less than 21 years not more than 30 years
	Strong computer skills (Microsoft Office, Google tools, scheduling apps)
	Excellent communication skills (written and spoken English)
	Highly organized, neat, and professional in conduct
	Must reside in Ojodu Berger or nearby areas
	Available to resume immediately
	Must be willing to commit for at least one year.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their &nbsp;CV to:&nbsp;Thowbiemakeovershrdept@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Personal Assistant Application&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Thowbiemakeovers"
    
  },

Female Personal Assistant to the CEO Job at Thowbiemakeovers




        
    

        
        Welcome to Thowbiemakeovers, Our company Majors in Aesthetic Medicine and Medical Spa services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Personal Assistant to the CEO

Job Location: Ojodu Berger & Environs, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Working Days: Monday – Saturday

Job Description


	Are you highly organized, proactive, and ready to work closely with top-level management? We are looking for a smart, reliable, and professional Personal Assistant to support the CEO in daily operations.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage schedules, appointments, and meetings efficiently
	Handle correspondence and communication on behalf of the CEO
	Prepare reports, documents, and presentations
	Coordinate activities and ensure smooth daily operations
	Maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc or equivalent qualification
	At least 2 years of experience as a Personal Assistant or similar role and must not be less than 21 years not more than 30 years
	Strong computer skills (Microsoft Office, Google tools, scheduling apps)
	Excellent communication skills (written and spoken English)
	Highly organized, neat, and professional in conduct
	Must reside in Ojodu Berger or nearby areas
	Available to resume immediately
	Must be willing to commit for at least one year.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their  CV to: [email protected] using “Personal Assistant Application” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Officer",
  "description": "MARANA Global Services Limited is a Nigerian company that provides safety and environmental training and engineering services for the public and private sector establishments. Our vision is to set a global pace in safety and environmental training and services.&nbsp;We are Accreditedd Training Provider for Institute of Safety Professionals of Nigeria (ISPON).

Established in year 2015, we have been committed to our vision and we are working towards setting standards for health and safety professional practice in Nigeria. For online training and distance learning, as well as physical classes, please visit our website for more information.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We&#39;re seeking a highly organized and efficient Administrative Officer to join our team.
	You&#39;ll provide administrative support, manage office operations, and ensure smooth day-to-day functioning.


Responsibilities


	Manage and coordinate administrative tasks, schedules, and calendars
	Prepare and maintain accurate records, reports, and files
	Provide excellent customer service to visitors, clients, and colleagues
	Coordinate travel arrangements, meetings, and events
	Maintain office supplies, equipment, and facilities
	Support HR tasks, such as recruitment and employee onboarding


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration or related field
	Excellent communication, organizational, and time management skills
	Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Suite
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Key Skills:


	Administrative management
	Communication and customer service
	Organizational and time management
	Microsoft Office and Google Suite proficiency
	Problem-solving and adaptability.


What We Offer


	Salary: N250,000 / month.
	Competitive salary and benefits
	Opportunities for growth and professional development
	Dynamic work environment with a talented team.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;smaranaglobal@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Administrative Officer Job at MARANA Global Services Limited




        
    

        
        MARANA Global Services Limited is a Nigerian company that provides safety and environmental training and engineering services for the public and private sector establishments. Our vision is to set a global pace in safety and environmental training and services. We are Accreditedd Training Provider for Institute of Safety Professionals of Nigeria (ISPON).

Established in year 2015, we have been committed to our vision and we are working towards setting standards for health and safety professional practice in Nigeria. For online training and distance learning, as well as physical classes, please visit our website for more information.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We're seeking a highly organized and efficient Administrative Officer to join our team.
	You'll provide administrative support, manage office operations, and ensure smooth day-to-day functioning.


Responsibilities


	Manage and coordinate administrative tasks, schedules, and calendars
	Prepare and maintain accurate records, reports, and files
	Provide excellent customer service to visitors, clients, and colleagues
	Coordinate travel arrangements, meetings, and events
	Maintain office supplies, equipment, and facilities
	Support HR tasks, such as recruitment and employee onboarding


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration or related field
	Excellent communication, organizational, and time management skills
	Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Suite
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Key Skills:


	Administrative management
	Communication and customer service
	Organizational and time management
	Microsoft Office and Google Suite proficiency
	Problem-solving and adaptability.


What We Offer


	Salary: N250,000 / month.
	Competitive salary and benefits
	Opportunities for growth and professional development
	Dynamic work environment with a talented team.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Software Engineer",
  "description": "At Genesis Group, we`&#39;`ve been living our dreams and redefining the world of hospitality for over three decades. Our journey has been characterized by excellence in a wide range of services, including Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cinemas. With a team of over 10,000 dedicated professionals and 30 locations spanning across Nigeria and beyond, we take pride in delivering exceptional experiences to our valued customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Core Responsibilities


	Documentation:Create technical documentation for software designs and user manuals.
	Optimization:Improve existing software for better performance, speed, and scalability.
	Development:Design and code software applications and systems.
	Testing &amp; Maintenance:Debug, test, and troubleshoot systems to ensure high quality and security.
	Collaboration:Work with cross-functional teams to translate user requirements into technical specs


Typical Technical Skills &amp; Requirements


	Education:Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science, software engineering, or related field.
	Programming Languages:Proficiency in C++, C# .NET, Java, Python, JavaScript,Node.js
	Tools:Experience with Git (version control), IDEs, and Agile methodologies.
	Database Knowledge:Strong skills in SQL/PLSQL, MySQL, or NoSQL databases.
	System Knowledge:Understanding of Operating Systems (Linux, Windows) and APIs.


Soft Skills:


	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Excellent teamwork and communication skills.
	Adaptability to new technologies.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified Candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;vacancies@genesisgroupng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

        At Genesis Group, we`'`ve been living our dreams and redefining the world of hospitality for over three decades. Our journey has been characterized by excellence in a wide range of services, including Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cinemas. With a team of over 10,000 dedicated professionals and 30 locations spanning across Nigeria and beyond, we take pride in delivering exceptional experiences to our valued customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Engineer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Core Responsibilities

	Documentation:Create technical documentation for software designs and user manuals.
	Optimization:Improve existing software for better performance, speed, and scalability.
	Development:Design and code software applications and systems.
	Testing & Maintenance:Debug, test, and troubleshoot systems to ensure high quality and security.
	Collaboration:Work with cross-functional teams to translate user requirements into technical specs


Typical Technical Skills & Requirements


	Education:Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, software engineering, or related field.
	Programming Languages:Proficiency in C++, C# .NET, Java, Python, JavaScript,Node.js
	Tools:Experience with Git (version control), IDEs, and Agile methodologies.
	Database Knowledge:Strong skills in SQL/PLSQL, MySQL, or NoSQL databases.
	System Knowledge:Understanding of Operating Systems (Linux, Windows) and APIs.


Soft Skills:


	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Excellent teamwork and communication skills.
	Adaptability to new technologies.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified Candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
